title: anthemis cotula var. vectensis
intro: Anthemis cotula var. vectensis is a variant of the Anthemis cotula plant, commonly known as dog fennel or stink fennel. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthemis cotula var. vectensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
